title: Timetracking overview

posts.author: JasmineAr (Jasmine)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I have a problem and a suggestion for the IT team.
Is there maybe a possibility to have a tracking system for my team, so I can see in 1 overview for which project they have been working on and when?
We currently have 20+ boards, it costs me very much time to download the time tracking table and filter it in excel per person, per project. Hopefully, you can do something about it…

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there, my team actually created a custom coded solution in this area. It’s a board view that allows you to choose time tracking columns on multiple boards to pull excel reports from where the time is grouped by person/board. Maybe it’ll help . It’s a private app and just a prototype for now but you can install it with this link. Let me know if you find it useful.
